label: About Section
description: Edit the About section content and coverage pillars.

fields.label: Heading
fields.hint: Main heading for the About section

fields.label: Paragraph 1
fields.value: The Breakdown is a news analysis platform that goes beyond headlines. We break down geopolitics, technology, economy, and media with forensic precision.

fields.label: Paragraph 2
fields.value: No pundits. No hype. No partisan angles. Just the analysis you need to understand what is actually happening and why it matters.

fields.label: Paragraph 3
fields.value: Every story gets the same treatment: context, stakes, what both sides are missing, and what to watch next.

fields.label: Coverage Pillars

value.name: Media / Press
value.desc: 12% of coverage. Press freedom, platform bans.

fields.hint: Four coverage pillars displayed as cards in the About section
